summary: Horizontal video. A WPBF 25 News (West Palm Beach) local TV news package with '25 WPBF NEWS' branding, a 'GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN' banner, and a 'FINANCIAL STRAIN MOUNTS FOR TSA OFFICERS' chyron. It includes interviews with AFGE Local 558 union representatives about TSA officers missing paychecks, plus B-roll of an airport security checkpoint and a traveler line. It is a recorded broadcast news segment with no music track.
notable_text: FINANCIAL STRAIN MOUNTS FOR TSA OFFICERS; GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN; 25 WPBF NEWS; J. Jarvis WPBF 25 News
